## Checklist

- [ ] I've read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] Changes are written in English.
- [ ] If this changes scope, requirements, or an interface between components, it is accompanied by an ADR in `docs/decisions/`.
- [ ] Cross-references between documents (links, requirement IDs) are updated and consistent.
- [ ] If this affects `SPECIFICATION.md` or `ARCHITECTURE.md`, `CHANGELOG.md` is updated under `[Unreleased]`.
- [ ] For component implementation changes: no cross-component coupling was introduced beyond the documented interfaces (see [ARCHITECTURE.md §4](../ARCHITECTURE.md#4-component-boundaries)).
